evidence: Меня всегда интересовали математика, информатика и программирование.
Я хочу поступить в университет и развиваться в сфере технологий.
I worked in a team during a school project and learned problem solving.
В школе я участвовал в олимпиадах и школьных проектах.
The candidate showed strong leadership skills when discussing their school projects.
explanation: Candidate evaluation yielded a composite score of 49.7. Strongest area is motivation, while leadership_potential is the primary growth opportunity. Note: Discrepancies between sources were found. Human review recommended for final sign-off.
validation_note: The system is evaluated on a synthetic dataset with manually defined rubric scores.
